_comment: Patterns the triage tool uses to classify QA failures as KNOWN false-positives, so a run's headline number reflects REAL bugs only. 'infra' rules apply to any venture (environment / rate-limiting). Per-venture keys (e.g. 'vb-hopo') hold test-harness bugs that live in THAT venture's e2e-kit — each should be tracked as an issue in the venture repo. Remove a rule once its venture fix lands so the failure starts counting as REAL again.

infra.reason: Browser project not installed — run `npm run hopo:setup`, or scope to --project=desktop
vb-account E2E API rate-limited (CloudFront WAF) under a provisioning burst — lower workers / batch the run

vb-hopo.reason: Isolation member-mgmt BOLA cases error in setup — no target member is seeded (test-harness gap, not a product bug)
/home readiness testId is gated on dwellings>0 (HomePage.vue v-if) — not an always-present marker, so a dwelling-less user times out
